questions.question: Exercise Varuna 2025 was conducted between India and which country?
In 2025, which Indian state unveiled plans to establish the country’s first Quantum Computing Village?
In 2025, which of the following institutions was designated as one of the Thematic Hubs (T-Hubs) under India's National Quantum Mission (NQM)?
In which location was Exercise Cyclone 2025 conducted with Egypt in February?
The Indian Genomic Data Set launched in 2025 is stored at which of the following facilities?
Which Act does the Digital Personal Data Protection Rules, 2025, facilitate the implementation of?
Which of the following cities hosted World Para Athletics Championships 2025?
Which of the following Indian states became the third to achieve full functional literacy under the ULLAS - Nav Bharat Saaksharta Karyakram (New India Literacy Programme) in June 2025?
Which organisation hosted the National Agro-RE Summit 2025?
questions.option_4: National Solar Energy Federation of India
